function: S-adenosyl-L-methionine:24-methylenesterol C-methyltransferase. Catalyses 1st methylation (cycloartenol to 24-methylenecycloartenol) and 2nd methylation (24-methylenelophenol to 24-ethylidenelophenol). Also episterol to avenosterol cross-branch.
notes: iCre1355 uses Cre12.g503650 (SMM40) for CYARTMT reaction. Sole SMT in C. reinhardtii.

function: C-4 methyl sterol oxidase (methyl sterol monooxygenase). Part of C4-demethylation complex with ERG26 and ERG28. Acts on both trunk and branch substrates.
notes: KEGG auto-annotation assigns K04713 (sphinganine monooxygenase) - Moroney et al. 2016 assigns ERG25 by homology. Verify before use.
Alternative locus for ERG26 in iCre1355 GPR (OR with Cre12.g518650)

function: ER membrane scaffold protein for C4-demethylation complex. No enzymatic activity.

Sterol C-14 reductase / delta24(28)-sterol reductase. Dual-use: trunk step (4-alpha-methyl trienol to 4-alpha-methylfecosterol) and terminal branch step (stigmasta-5-7-22-24(28)-trienol to 7-dehydroporiferasterol).
notes: iCre1355 reaction IDs: MERGTROLR / 44MZYMOR. UniProt annotates as Delta(14)-sterol reductase ERG24.

function: C8-sterol isomerase (delta8 to delta7 isomerization). 4-alpha-methylfecosterol to 24-methylenelophenol (branch point).
notes: iCre1355 reaction IDs: CHLSTI / CHLSTD78I (Cre12.g557900 OR Cre12.g557950)
Alternative locus for CDI1/HYD1 in iCre1355 GPR

function: Delta7-sterol C5-desaturase. Avenosterol to stigmasta-5-7-24(28)-trienol. Functionally validated by yeast complementation (Brumfield et al. 2010).
notes: iCre1355 reaction ID: LTHSTRLOR (gene symbol: ERG3)
Moroney et al. 2016 assignment. KEGG currently lists as uncharacterized.
